name: Fruit Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Add sugar to eggs. Beat thoroughly.
2. Add shortening and sour milk, mixing well.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice), and baking powder into a separate bowl.
4. Mix in the raisins.
5. Drop mixture by teaspoonfuls onto a well-oiled baking sheet.
6. Bake in a hot oven (400°F) for 12-15 minutes.
